allowed_scratchbird_effect: Create drop attach detach ScratchBird logical databases through ScratchBird authority when policy permits
forbidden_effect: Creating deleting or opening Firebird database files; importing Firebird ODS/page authority
required_response: Firebird-compatible success metadata or authority-violation diagnostic
notes: Database names resolve to ScratchBird catalog identities and UUIDs

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Record storage-compatibility metadata and render deterministic diagnostics or reports
forbidden_effect: Creating shadow files raw devices or Firebird storage chains
required_response: Authority-violation diagnostic or emulated no-file report
notes: No valid surface is dropped; it is owned by policy response

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Produce ScratchBird export/import reports or invoke ScratchBird logical backup/restore if explicitly supported by policy
forbidden_effect: Reading writing Firebird backup format as runtime storage authority or restoring Firebird physical files
required_response: Emulated progress/output text normalized to Firebird shape or authority-violation diagnostic
notes: Reference gbak may run only as sandboxed CTest oracle

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Expose ScratchBird backup-state report or policy-denied no-file diagnostic
forbidden_effect: Locking Firebird files writing difference files incremental pages or state files
required_response: Firebird-compatible service output with emulated state or authority violation
notes: Incremental physical backup semantics are represented as report/policy rows

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Run ScratchBird logical validation/statistics routines or emit compatibility report
forbidden_effect: Modifying Firebird pages repair flags ODS garbage collection or sweep authority
required_response: Emulated validation/statistics output or authority-violation diagnostic

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Create metadata projection only when policy maps to ScratchBird controlled external-data feature
forbidden_effect: Opening arbitrary server filesystem paths using Firebird external table authority
required_response: Policy-required diagnostic or controlled ScratchBird external-data mapping
notes: Path effects require explicit ScratchBird policy

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Expose ScratchBird tracing sessions and monitoring projections using Firebird-compatible names and output
forbidden_effect: Starting Firebird trace plugins reading Firebird trace files or loading Firebird configs as authority
required_response: Emulated trace service output or diagnostics
notes: Trace grammar is parsed for compatibility but applied to ScratchBird tracing policy

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Map trusted ScratchBird extension registrations or deny with Firebird-compatible diagnostics
forbidden_effect: Loading Firebird plugins UDF libraries filters encryption providers or external engines into runtime products
notes: Trusted UDR checks signature ABI version and policy

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Project ScratchBird security authority into Firebird-compatible user role mapping and service outputs
forbidden_effect: Reading or writing Firebird security database files or accepting Firebird auth plugins as authority
required_response: ScratchBird security result rendered as Firebird SQL/service diagnostic or output
notes: Security compatibility is not Firebird security database emulation as authority

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Expose ScratchBird replication/migration capability reports and policy-denied diagnostics
forbidden_effect: Creating Firebird journals archives replication files or applying Firebird replication authority
required_response: Emulated service report or authority-violation diagnostic
notes: Migration and replication are ScratchBird-owned services only

allowed_scratchbird_effect: Return sandbox/test-only utility output or ScratchBird service status where policy allows
forbidden_effect: Starting stopping supervising Firebird server processes or removing Firebird IPC/shared memory resources
required_response: Authority-violation diagnostic outside CTest sandbox; normalized output inside reference-native test lane
notes: Runtime products must not perform host process management for reference utilities

allowed_scratchbird_effect: In test harness normalize local client file effects and route SQL to parser/listener
forbidden_effect: Allowing runtime parser/UDR packages to perform arbitrary shell or local filesystem effects
required_response: Client-side expected output in reference-native tests or policy diagnostic in service/runtime contexts
notes: Client-only effects are tested as reference-tool behavior not engine authority
